title: OYO Rooms is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: OYO Rooms is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms family as a E-commerce Executive in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
